note: Curated external resources. Per CONSTITUTION.md rule VIII/X, Workbench links out to the community's own archives and credits them, rather than absorbing their work. Opened in the user's normal browser, not squeezed onto a 40-column screen.

resources.title: Buy the USB↔Minitel adapter cable
resources.note: USB-to-DIN 5-pin cable for the Minitel's peripheral socket — the one this project was built and tested with. The same seller sometimes has restored Minitels. (eBay listings move; if it has gone, search eBay.fr for 'câble Minitel USB DIN'.)

resources.title: Musée du Minitel — forum
resources.note: Hardware, software, Videotex/ASCII art, restoration and community discussion, organised around preserving Minitel heritage.

resources.title: Musée Minitel Alcatel
resources.note: Extensive historical collection and model archive; downloadable documents (Touzalin/CCETT history 1978–1989, Les Échos Informatique 1991) via the site menu.

resources.title: Minitel — Wikipédia (fr)
resources.note: Development history, service ecosystem, technical generations, the 2012 shutdown, bibliography.

resources.title: Histoire détaillée de la Télématique
resources.note: A thorough, detailed history of French telematics.

resources.title: Le Monde — La fin du Minitel programmée en 2012
resources.note: Press coverage of the planned shutdown.

resources.title: Retrocampus BBS — Francesco Sblendorio
resources.note: One of the most active, generous corners of the living Minitel world. Free to access.

resources.title: MiniPavi — gateway & directory
resources.note: Gateway to hundreds of services; its in-terminal Guide is the authoritative live directory.

resources.title: pR-0000 — Minitel RS232/USB Telnet Interface
resources.note: The community bridge that first got this terminal online, and the direct inspiration for Workbench's bridge. Credit and thanks.
